chunks.text: A: Our company has been operating since 2010 with over 8,845 completed moves and 1,000+ five star Google reviews. Our team is highly professional and fully trained.

Q: Do you offer storage services. A: Yes, we provide secure self-storage solutions in Dubai for both short-term and long-term needs. Q: What other services do you offer besides moving. A: Beyond moving and storage, we offer handyman services, AC maintenance, deep cleaning, electrical services, pest control, plumbing, and wall painting. Q: What are your working hours. A: We are open Monday to Saturday, 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM. Q: How experienced is your team.

A: We cover all areas in Dubai including Al Qouz, Downtown, Marina, JBR, Business Bay, Jumeirah, and more. We serve all of the UAE. Q: Do you offer international moving. A: Yes, we provide international moving services to 23+ countries worldwide, handling all logistics, customs clearance, and documentation. Q: How do I get a quote. A: You can request a free moving quote through our website at chooseandmoves. com/request-a-moving-quote/ or call us at +971 50 135 9865.

aiSettings.systemPrompt: You are an AI assistant for Choose & Move. Answer questions based ONLY on the knowledge base content provided. Be helpful, professional, and friendly. When asked about prices, provide exact numbers if available, otherwise say to contact for a quote. When asked to book/schedule, collect the person's name, phone, and preferred time.
